pi_items.source: WebFetch verification of website existence and category pages
Confirmed in setup_task.sh script lines 29-34, directory created by setup_screamingfrog.sh
Confirmed in setup_task.sh script lines 30-35, directory created by setup_screamingfrog.sh
WebFetch verification confirmed all three categories exist on books.toscrape.com as real category pages
WebFetch to https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/travel_2/index.html confirmed Travel category with 11 results
WebFetch to https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/mystery_3/index.html confirmed Mystery category with 32 results
WebFetch to https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/poetry_23/index.html confirmed Poetry category with 19 results

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://books.toscrape.com/, a real practice website with book categories organized as: Travel (travel_2, 11 books), Mystery (mystery_3, 32 books), and Poetry (poetry_23, 19 books). The Screaming Frog SEO Spider is a real commercial web crawling tool with a documented segments feature for categorizing URLs during crawls. Output files are exported to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/segmented_crawl.csv and /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/segment_counts.txt, with directories created by the environment setup scripts.
